'''larapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamburak|zamburak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamburak|zamburak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| larapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læræpæth|læræpæth]] || [[word:læræpæj|læræpæj]] || [[word:læræpæsh|læræpæsh]] || [[word:læræpæ|læræpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lararapath|lararapath]] || [[word:lararapaj|lararapaj]] || [[word:lararapash|lararapash]] || [[word:lararapa|lararapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:larapath|larapath]] || [[word:larapaj|larapaj]] || [[word:larapash|larapash]] || [[word:larapa|larapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:larafpath|larafpath]] || [[word:larafpaj|larafpaj]] || [[word:larafpash|larafpash]] || [[word:larafpaf|larafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:larapatha|larapatha]] || [[word:larapaja|larapaja]] || [[word:larapasha|larapasha]] || [[word:larapaka|larapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:larapath|larapath]] || [[word:larapaj|larapaj]] || [[word:larapash|larapash]] || [[word:larapa|larapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:larapathal|larapathal]] || [[word:larapajal|larapajal]] || [[word:larapashal|larapashal]] || [[word:larapakal|larapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:larapathatha|larapathatha]] || [[word:larapajaja|larapajaja]] || [[word:larapashasha|larapashasha]] || [[word:larapaka|larapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:larapathan|larapathan]] || [[word:larapajan|larapajan]] || [[word:larapashan|larapashan]] || [[word:larapakan|larapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:larapathaoro|larapathaoro]] || [[word:larapajaoro|larapajaoro]] || [[word:larapashaoro|larapashaoro]] || [[word:larapakaoro|larapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
